command:
uv run python -c 
from tasks.t0012_tuning_curve_scoring_loss_library.code.tuning_curve_loss import (
    score, ScoreReport, TUNING_CURVE_CSV_COLUMNS, load_tuning_curve,
    compute_dsi, compute_hwhm_deg, compute_peak_hz, compute_null_hz, compute_reliability,
    DEFAULT_WEIGHTS, DEFAULT_ENVELOPE,
)
print('TUNING_CURVE_CSV_COLUMNS =', TUNING_CURVE_CSV_COLUMNS)
from tasks.t0012_tuning_curve_scoring_loss_library.code.tuning_curve_loss.paths import TARGET_MEAN_CSV
print('TARGET_MEAN_CSV =', TARGET_MEAN_CSV, 'exists =', TARGET_MEAN_CSV.exists())
curve = load_tuning_curve(csv_path=TARGET_MEAN_CSV)
print('angles =', curve.angles_deg.tolist())
print('rates =', curve.firing_rates_hz.tolist())
print('trials shape =', None if curve.trials is None else curve.trials.shape)
print('dsi =', compute_dsi(curve=curve))
print('peak =', compute_peak_hz(curve=curve))
print('null =', compute_null_hz(curve=curve))
print('hwhm =', compute_hwhm_deg(curve=curve))
print('rel =', compute_reliability(curve=curve))
report = score(TARGET_MEAN_CSV, TARGET_MEAN_CSV)
print('loss_scalar =', report.loss_scalar)
print('passes_envelope =', report.passes_envelope)
print('per_target_pass =', report.per_target_pass)
